hero.title: Open the doors to Turkey with Turkish
hero.description: For those who want to learn Turkish as a foreign language, we offer a culture-focused program that enables effective communication from daily life to the business world.

items.title: A bridging language
items.text: A language connecting Europe and Asia, increasingly valued in trade and tourism.

items.title: Rich culture
items.text: Access literature, music, cinema, and culinary culture in the original language.

items.title: Structured grammar
items.text: With its regular and systematic grammar, you progress quickly as you grasp its logic.

useCases.title: Who is this program for?
items: Foreigners living in or planning to live in Turkey
Professionals working with Turkish business partners
Those who want to connect with Turkish culture and family

hero.title: Speak confidently in the world's common language
hero.description: Learn English — the language most needed for work, education, and travel — through speaking-focused lessons with practice from day one.

items.title: Career opportunity
items.text: One of the most sought-after skills in the global business world.

items.title: Unlimited content
items.text: Access the vast majority of information, courses, and entertainment on the internet.

items.title: Academic success
items.text: Opens doors to international education through exams like IELTS and TOEFL.

useCases.title: Who is this program for?
items: Students who want to support their school curriculum
Professionals who want to stand out in their careers
Those seeking practice for travel and daily communication

hero.title: Learn the language of Europe's strong economy
hero.description: Learn German — the key to education and career opportunities in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland — through a step-by-step, practice-oriented program.

items.title: Education opportunity
items.text: The chance for free education at most public universities in Germany.

items.title: Strong economy
items.text: Job and internship opportunities in Europe's largest economy.

items.title: Engineering and science
items.text: Direct access to resources and careers in technical fields.

useCases.title: Who is this program for?
items: Those aiming to study in Germany
Those planning work visas and careers
Those who want to advance in engineering and science

hero.title: Discover the elegant language of diplomacy and art
hero.description: Learn French — spoken across five continents and essential in culture and diplomacy — through enjoyable and interactive lessons.

items.title: International language
items.text: One of the official languages of the UN, EU, and many international organizations.

items.title: Culture and art
items.text: The language at the center of literature, cinema, fashion, and gastronomy.

items.title: Career network
items.text: A broad business and travel network stretching from Africa to Canada.

useCases.title: Who is this program for?
items: Those interested in art, fashion, and culture
Those targeting education or careers in Francophone countries
Those who want to discover the aesthetics of a new language

hero.title: Experience the energy of two continents in Spanish
hero.description: Learn Spanish — one of the most spoken languages in the world and enjoyable to learn — quickly through speaking-focused and fun lessons.

items.title: Fast progress
items.text: One of the easiest languages to learn with its read-as-written structure.

items.title: Wide geography
items.text: Communicate with hundreds of millions of people in Spain and Latin America.

items.title: Culture and travel
items.text: Opens a colorful door to music, TV series, and the world of travel.

useCases.title: Who is this program for?
items: Those interested in Latin culture and travel
Beginners who want fast results
Those who want to expand their business network to Latin America

hero.title: Step into the language of a vast geography
hero.description: Learn Russian — the powerful language of Eurasia — from scratch with a patient and structured program covering the alphabet through everyday conversation.

items.title: Trade opportunity
items.text: A valuable advantage in intensive commercial relations with Turkey.

items.title: Rich literature
items.text: The opportunity to read world classics in the original language.

items.title: Wide usage
items.text: A widespread language you can use to communicate in many countries.

useCases.title: Who is this program for?
items: Those working in tourism and trade sectors
Those with ties to Russian-speaking countries
Those who want to discover a new alphabet and culture

hero.title: Invest in the future with the world's most spoken language
hero.description: Learn Mandarin Chinese step by step and enjoyably through visual and interactive methods — from tones to characters.

items.title: Economic power
items.text: The advantage of doing business with one of the world's largest markets.

items.title: Stand out in competition
items.text: This rarely known language makes a difference on your résumé.

items.title: Ancient culture
items.text: Access to a rich culture and world of thought spanning thousands of years.

useCases.title: Who is this program for?
items: Professionals targeting international trade
Those who want to learn a different writing system
Those seeking a strategic language for the future

ui.levelNote: Whatever your level, we will assess it together in a free introductory lesson and create a personalized plan for you.
ui.footerCtaDescription: Take the first step with a free introductory lesson in a learning experience supported by expert teachers and smart technology.
